testcase.name: Register, Login and Place Order for Computer
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [testuser9683@test.com] but found [My account] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:656) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:666) at com.demowebshop.stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.userShouldBeLoggedInSuccessfully(LoginSteps.java:30) at ?.User should be logged in successfully(file:///C:/Users/Gregory%20Zwane/IdeaProjects/DemoWebShopWebsite/src/test/resources/features/demowebshop.feature:14)
